sections.title: Breaking
items: Replaced provideFrameUI theme options strategy, mode, attribute, and className with theme.controlledBy and theme.using.
Use theme: { controlledBy: 'frame', using: 'data-theme' } when FrameUI should write html[data-theme].
Use theme: { controlledBy: 'app', using: 'class' } when the app owns html.dark and FrameUI should only read it.

sections.title: Changed
items: Updated theming documentation to explain the theme decision as who controls light/dark and which root selector is used.
